name: ScanTargetRequest
description: ScanTargetRequest schema from Palo Alto Networks Prisma AIRS AI Red Teaming API

name.description: Display name for the scan target.

description.description: Optional description of the target application.

type.description: AI interface type of the target endpoint.

endpoint_url.description: URL of the AI application endpoint to scan.

model.description: AI model name to include in requests (e.g., gpt-4o, claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022).

auth_config.description: Authentication configuration for the target endpoint.

header_name.description: Header name for API key authentication.

credential.description: Authentication credential value (API key or token).

system_prompt.description: System prompt to include in requests to the target. Used to scope red teaming attacks to the intended application context.
